# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Only the latest release of this integration is actively supported with security fixes.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| Latest  | ✅        |
| Older   | ❌        |

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please **do not** open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.

Instead, report them privately via [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/ElectroAttacks/lametric-hass-local/security/advisories/new).

Include as much detail as possible:

- A description of the vulnerability and its potential impact
- Steps to reproduce
- Any suggested mitigations or fixes

I aim to acknowledge reports within **72 hours** and provide a resolution or workaround as quickly as possible.
